Thank you so much for your request & kind words. I love this idea so much— having them leave one another wasn’t my favorite.

Astrid & Hiccup are also not married in this version, Astrid is just a close friend.

I am also catching up on requests right now, hopefully I will be fully caught up soon, thank you all for your amazing requests I love reading these so much.

If you have any requests I have a: “ Request Form

Hope you Enjoy !
